reference: I am fifty-six years old. My height is five feet five inches. I am female and have been having difficulty leaning back while sitting on a chair for over ten years now. I had an MRI done of the lumbar four, five, and tailbone today. One of the disturbing things that showed up was a cyst in the tailbone. What is it? Is it sebaceous? How does one deal with it?
text: I am 56 years old. My height is 5 feet 5 inches. I am female and have been having difficulty leaning back while sitting on a chair for over 10 years now. I had an MRI done of the lumbar, forward 5, and tailbone today. One of the disturbing things that showed up was a cyst in the tailbone. What is it? Is it sebaceous? What does one do with it?
